description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The front facade features a combination of light gray brickwork and white trim, with a prominent garage door and a covered entryway supported by columns. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway, two small green lawn patches in front, and a spacious backyard area with a tan surface. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light gray brick exterior, large windows, a garage, and a mix of paved and green yard areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, two green lawn patches, and a covered porch with columns.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain brick wall with three windows and the transition from paved driveway to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a large tan backyard area and symmetrical window placement on both floors.
description_view_3: Right side view with a single window and a clear view of the paved driveway and green lawn patches in front.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, single main door, and adjacent garage door
